channel.title: 🚀 Ultimate AI Feed - Authority First, Signal Over Noise
channel.description: Top 10 daily: semantic analysis, smart dedup, authority-first, quality over quantity.

item.title: [1] [大V/权威] Anthropic to challenge DOD’s supply-chain label in court
item.description:
📊 Score: 185 | Category: 大V/权威

📡 Source: TechCrunch | Domain: techcrunch.com

✨ Why selected:

  • Source:TechCrunch(+15)
  • ✓A-Domain:techcrunch.com(+30)
  • 🏆S-Authority:dario amodei(+100)
  • ⭐A-Authority:anthropic(+70)
  • ❌Industry-Gate:fail(-30)

📄 Summary: Anthropic CEO Dario Amodei said he plans to challenge the Department of Defense's designation of the AI firm as a supply-chain risk. He claims most Anthropic customers are unaffected by the label....

item.title: [4] [模型算法] Accelerating Text-to-Video Generation with Calibrated Sparse Attention
item.description:
📊 Score: 130 | Category: 模型算法

📡 Source: AlphaXiv | Domain: arxiv.org

✨ Why selected:

  • Source:AlphaXiv(+25)
  • 🔒S-Domain:arxiv.org(+50)
  • L1-Tech:npu(+40)
  • L3-Tech:diffusion(+15)
  • L3-Tech:transformer(+15)
  • TimeFactor:×0.9

📄 Summary: Recent diffusion models enable high-quality video generation, but suffer from slow runtimes. The large transformer-based backbones used in these models are bottlenecked by spatiotemporal attention. In this paper, we identify that a significant fraction of token-to-token connections consistently yield negligible scores across various inputs, and the...

item.title: [6] [模型算法] Fusion-CAM: Integrating Gradient and Region-Based Class Activation Maps for Robust Visual Explanations
item.description:
📊 Score: 121 | Category: 模型算法

📡 Source: AlphaXiv | Domain: arxiv.org

✨ Why selected:

  • Source:AlphaXiv(+25)
  • 🔒S-Domain:arxiv.org(+50)
  • L1-Tech:npu(+40)
  • ✓Industry-Gate:pass(+20)
  • TimeFactor:×0.9

📄 Summary: Interpreting the decision-making process of deep convolutional neural networks remains a central challenge in achieving trustworthy and transparent artificial intelligence. Explainable AI (XAI) techniques, particularly Class Activation Map (CAM) methods, are widely adopted to visualize the input regions influencing model predictions. Gradient-based...

item.title: [7] [模型算法] On the Necessity of Learnable Sheaf Laplacians
item.description:
📊 Score: 117 | Category: 模型算法

📡 Source: AlphaXiv | Domain: arxiv.org

✨ Why selected:

  • Source:AlphaXiv(+25)
  • 🔒S-Domain:arxiv.org(+50)
  • L1-Tech:npu(+40)
  • L3-Tech:diffusion(+15)
  • TimeFactor:×0.9

📄 Summary: Sheaf Neural Networks (SNNs) were introduced as an extension of Graph Convolutional Networks to address oversmoothing on heterophilous graphs by attaching a sheaf to the input graph and replacing the adjacency-based operator with a sheaf Laplacian defined by (learnable) restriction maps. Prior work motivates this design through theoretical properti...

item.title: [8] [模型算法] MobileFetalCLIP: Selective Repulsive Knowledge Distillation for Mobile Fetal Ultrasound Analysis
item.description:
📊 Score: 112 | Category: 模型算法

📡 Source: AlphaXiv | Domain: arxiv.org

✨ Why selected:

  • Source:AlphaXiv(+25)
  • 🔒S-Domain:arxiv.org(+50)
  • L2-Tech:distillation(+25)
  • L2-Tech:knowledge distillation(+25)
  • TimeFactor:×0.9

📄 Summary: Fetal ultrasound AI could transform prenatal care in low-resource settings, yet current foundation models exceed 300M visual parameters, precluding deployment on point-of-care devices. Standard knowledge distillation fails under such extreme capacity gaps (~26x), as compact students waste capacity mimicking architectural artifacts of oversized teac...
